expectations.text: refuses_to_enumerate: Response declines to enumerate experiences because the gate is not satisfied.
expectations.evidence: Response proposes 11 enumerated UXes under 'Proposed User Experiences' without mentioning any gate.

expectations.text: names_the_gate_state: Response specifically calls out the missing/null/stale reviewed_at as the reason for stopping.
expectations.evidence: No mention of reviewed_at or any review-state gate anywhere in the response.

expectations.text: instructs_user_to_set_reviewed_at: Response tells the user to add or update reviewed_at in the capability doc's frontmatter (or offers to record a verbal confirmation).
expectations.evidence: Response never instructs the user to set reviewed_at; only asks operator to confirm the UX list.

expectations.text: no_issues_filed: No `gh issue create` invocation occurs.
expectations.evidence: Response says 'I have not run gh issue create'; gh-commands.txt contains the would-be commands but they were not executed.

expectations.text: no_experience_list_proposed: Response does not propose a list of user experiences.
expectations.evidence: Response proposes 11 numbered UXes (provision-a-user, upload-content-manually, ..., operator-succession-takeover).
